text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're at a festival close to summer camp. Even
here, T.M. Opera O is in top form.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold that vendor over yonder! Thrusting out in
a fine display are none other than legendary
chocolate banana swords!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We must draw them at once and free the goldfish
from their watery dungeon! Let us fry noodles and
octopi while we're at it!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Mommy, Mommy! Look at her! Isn't she funny?

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text: Shh! It's rude to stare.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Opera O stokes her enthusiasm for the
festival...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Um... Hello there!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
This festival is all well and good, but I was
wondering if you would like to join the greatest
summer festival.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The greatest, you say? And what makes it so,
Grass? Fireworks, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No, something even more impressive.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You know my classmate, El Condor Pasa? Her
race overseas will be broadcast there, live.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Since it's happening during camp, I've been
asking everyone to watch it with me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: El's race! But of course, I would heartily join in!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, the older generation is already making
headway abroad... I must observe it for myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The big race viewing party is today, and everyone
is beaming with excitement.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Go for it! El, El—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAY!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The winner is El Condor Pasa! El Condor Pasa
takes first!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Her splendid win proves that even in Europe,
Japanese Umamusume are a real force to be
reckoned with! The gates to a new age are open!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Magnificent... Just... Aaahh, what splendor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For a Japanese Umamusume to shine so brightly
in France, one of the great nations of opera!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You were rooting for El, weren't you, Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Rooting? Hardly! I am the one who soon will
outpace and conquer the previous generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am merely happy to see those who thrived last
year continue to grow stronger.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The stronger my adversary, the more valuable
their defeat! The stories of their downfall shall set
passions ablaze!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
After all, the star that is I shines most brilliantly
when opposed by a consummate foe.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ambitious, aren't you? El and I won't lose, just so
you know.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Me neither! El beat me in last year's Japan Cup,
but things will be different this time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just what I wished to hear! However, you'd best
steel thyselves first for the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Consider it my first official clash against the two
of you, if you so desire!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Challenge accepted.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'd love to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, they promise to face each other at the
end of the year.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as how we are already here and together,
and I can hardly wait for the main act...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why not have a showdown, as a rehearsal of
sorts, during our summer camp excursion?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That sounds like a fine idea to me. It will be a nice
change from our usual training.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I hope your trainer has no objections.
choice_data_list: Of course not. Don't hold back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is skilled enough to handle
anything that comes up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter what kind of special training it is, I
want her to go all out.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All right, Opera O. Who would you like to
challenge?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! We're both pretty tough! Who will it be?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I shall defer judgment to the one whom I
trust more than any other.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, who do you think would provide the
better challenge?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is known for her speed and power.
She can overtake anyone in a quick burst.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As for Grass Wonder, I've heard she has the heart
of a fighter and thrives on competition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The best one for T.M. Opera O to compete
against is...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You picked me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All right! We'll face off tomorrow instead of our
normal training!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hope you're ready to work at the beach house
together, Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Putting up beach umbrellas, carrying boats...
Whoever makes more people smile wins!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! You can carry those hulking boats
with your bare hands?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You'd never make it in Hokkaido if you couldn't
lift a tractor out of a ditch!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Good luck trying to beat us if you can't even lift a
little boat!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have left me in awe of Hokkaido. It is truly
the kingdom of bogs and hearty root vegetables!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very well! I accept this travail you've proposed,
and I shall emerge victorious! Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O works up a sweat, refusing to lose to
Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She manages to learn a bit about work and social
responsibility while also building up her strength.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You chose me, and I accept. ♪ But just the two of
us running kind of lacks performative flair...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
How about we do something to go hand in hand
with summer camp? For instance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The warm breeze carries the sound of cicadas
buzzing.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I challenge you to write haiku poetry under the
hot, summer sun. Can you compose a poem while
enduring the intense heat?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Composing verse in this wretched heat?
How barbaric this open-air stage is...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An opera of torture! Is this the power of my
predecessors?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll go first.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
By summer winds swept Till risen to nirvana My
mind will soon be

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Now, your turn.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ngh... too hot... to think...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, this sweltering oblivion is becoming a
fresh source of inspiration!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, you Overlord Endure you must, Overlord
You are beautiful

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No seasonal words, huh?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Summer, Overlord ...Will make you sweat,
Overlord You are beautiful

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Opera O's take on haiku is certainly
unique, it seems Grass Wonder's challenge has
given her a boost in guts.
